Expenses.title: Expenses
Expenses.description: Here are the expenses that you created for your group.
Expenses.noExpenses: Your group doesn’t contain any expense yet.

ActiveUserModal.title: Who are you?
ActiveUserModal.description: Tell us which participant you are to let us customize how the information is displayed.
ActiveUserModal.nobody: I don’t want to select anyone
ActiveUserModal.footer: This setting can be changed later in the group settings.

NoRecent.description: You have not visited any group recently.
NoRecent.orAsk: or ask a friend to send you the link to an existing one.

RecentRemovedToast.title: Group has been removed
RecentRemovedToast.description: The group was removed from your recent groups list.

AddByURL.title: Add a group by URL
AddByURL.description: If a group was shared with you, you can paste its URL here to add it to your list.
AddByURL.error: Oops, we are not able to find the group from the URL you provided…

Groups.detailDescription: Expenses, balances, and activity for this group.

NameField.label: Group name
NameField.description: Enter a name for your group.

InformationField.label: Group information
InformationField.placeholder: What information is relevant to group participants?

CurrencyField.label: Currency symbol
CurrencyField.description: We’ll use it to display amounts.

CurrencyCodeField.label: Main currency
CurrencyCodeField.createDescription: All amounts and balances will be in this currency.
CurrencyCodeField.editDescription: All amounts and balances will be in this currency. Changing this will NOT convert expenses already entered, except when the currency has different "minor units" than the current one (e.g. changing from US Dollar to Japanese Yen)

SimplifyDebtsField.label: Simplify debts
SimplifyDebtsField.description: Reduce the number of payments by combining balances between group members (like Splitwise Pro). When off, each person only owes whoever paid for their share.

Participants.title: Participants
Participants.description: Enter the name for each participant.
Participants.protectedParticipant: This participant is part of expenses, and can not be removed.

Settings.title: Local settings
Settings.description: These settings are set per-device, and are used to customize your experience.

ActiveUserField.label: Active user
ActiveUserField.description: User used as default for paying expenses.

TitleField.label: Income title
TitleField.description: Enter a description for the income.

DateField.label: Income date
DateField.description: Enter the date the income was received.

currencyField.label: Currency of income
currencyField.description: The currency in which the income was received.

paidByField.label: Received by
paidByField.description: Select the participant who received the income.

paidFor.title: Received for
paidFor.description: Select who the income was received for.

Income.splitModeDescription: Select how to split the income.
Income.attachDescription: See and attach receipts to the income.

TitleField.label: Expense title
TitleField.description: Enter a description for the expense.

DateField.label: Expense date
DateField.description: Enter the date the expense was paid.

currencyField.label: Currency of expense
currencyField.description: The currency in which the expense was paid.

paidByField.label: Paid by
paidByField.description: Select the participant who paid the expense.

recurrenceRule.label: Expense Recurrence
recurrenceRule.description: Select how often the expense should repeat.

paidFor.title: Paid for
paidFor.description: Select who the expense was paid for.

Expense.splitModeDescription: Select how to split the expense.
Expense.attachDescription: See and attach receipts to the expense.

ExpenseForm.conversionUnavailable: To set a different currency per expense and convert amounts, select a non-custom currency for the group.

conversionRateState.error: Oops, we could not get the most recent rates.
conversionRateState.currencyNotFound: Oops, Frankfurter does not have the rate for this currency at this day.
conversionRateState.noDate: Enter the expense date to get a conversion rate.

DeletePopup.label: Delete
DeletePopup.title: Delete this expense?
DeletePopup.description: Do you really want to delete this expense? This action is irreversible.

TooBigToast.title: The file is too big
TooBigToast.description: The maximum file size you can upload is {maxSize}. Yours is {size}.

ErrorToast.title: Error while uploading document
ErrorToast.description: Something wrong happened when uploading the document. Please retry later or select a different file.

Dialog.title: Create from receipt
Dialog.description: Extract the expense information from a receipt photo.
Dialog.body: Upload the photo of a receipt, and we’ll scan it to extract the expense information if we can.
Dialog.editNext: You’ll be able to edit the expense information next.

TooBigToast.title: The file is too big
TooBigToast.description: The maximum file size you can upload is {maxSize}. Yours is {size}.

ErrorToast.title: Error while uploading document
ErrorToast.description: Something wrong happened when uploading the document. Please retry later or select a different file.

Balances.title: Balances
Balances.description: This is the amount that each participant paid or was paid for.

Actions.requestDescription: Send an email to someone who owes you in this group.
Actions.settleDescription: Record a payment you made to clear your balance.
Actions.noOneOwesYou: Nobody owes you in this group.
Actions.youOweNoOne: You don't owe anyone in this group.
Actions.allSettled: You're all settled up in this group.

Reimbursements.title: Suggested settlements
Reimbursements.description: Optimized payments to settle balances in this group.
Reimbursements.noImbursements: It looks like your group doesn’t need any settlement 😁
Reimbursements.requestConfirmDescription: An email will be sent to {name} requesting {amount}.

Stats.title: Stats
Stats.error: Could not load statistics. Please try again.
Stats.emptyState: No spending data available. Add expenses to see statistics.

Totals.title: Totals
Totals.description: Spending summary of the entire group.

CategoryBreakdown.title: Spending by Category
CategoryBreakdown.description: How the group's spending is distributed across categories.
CategoryBreakdown.emptyState: No spending data available to show category breakdown.

ParticipantRanking.title: Participant Ranking
ParticipantRanking.description: Participants ranked by total amount paid.
ParticipantRanking.emptyState: No spending data available to rank participants.

ExpenseDistribution.title: Expense Distribution
ExpenseDistribution.description: Comparison of what each participant paid versus their fair share on shared expenses. Excludes reimbursements.
ExpenseDistribution.emptyState: No spending data available to show expense distribution.

SpendingOverTime.title: Spending Over Time
SpendingOverTime.description: Monthly spending trends for the group.
SpendingOverTime.emptyState: No spending data available to show trends.

MonthOverMonth.title: Month-over-Month
MonthOverMonth.description: Comparison between the last two months of spending.
MonthOverMonth.emptyState: Not enough data to compare months.

DailyAverage.title: Daily Average
DailyAverage.description: Average spending per day across the group's active period.
DailyAverage.emptyState: No spending data available to compute daily average.

AggregateMetrics.title: Summary
AggregateMetrics.description: Key metrics about the group's expenses.

NetBalances.title: Net Balances
NetBalances.description: How much each participant is owed or owes.
NetBalances.emptyState: No spending data available to compute balances.

PaidVsShare.title: Paid vs Fair Share
PaidVsShare.description: Percentage of total each participant paid compared to their fair share.
PaidVsShare.emptyState: No spending data available to compare paid vs share.

Reimbursements.title: Reimbursements
Reimbursements.description: Payments recorded to settle balances. Expense distribution above excludes these amounts.
Reimbursements.suggestedDescription: Remaining payments needed to settle all balances (same as the Balances tab).
Reimbursements.allSettled: No reimbursements recorded and all balances are settled.

Activity.title: Activity
Activity.description: Overview of all activity in this group.
Activity.globalDescription: Overview of all activity across your groups.
Activity.globalListDescription: Recent changes across all your groups.
Activity.globalNoActivity: There is not yet any activity in your groups.
Activity.noActivity: There is not yet any activity in your group.

Information.title: Information
Information.description: Use this place to add any information that can be relevant to the group participants.

Share.title: Share
Share.description: For other participants to see the group and add expenses, share its URL with them.
Share.warningHelp: Every person with the group URL will be able to see and edit expenses. Share with caution!

SchemaErrors.duplicateParticipantName: Another participant already has this name.
SchemaErrors.amountNotZero: The amount must not be zero.
SchemaErrors.amountTenMillion: The amount must be lower than 10,000,000.
SchemaErrors.ratePositive: The rate must be strictly greater than zero.
SchemaErrors.paidForMin1: The expense must be paid for at least one participant.
SchemaErrors.noZeroShares: All shares must be higher than 0.
SchemaErrors.amountSum: Sum of amounts must equal the expense amount.

KnotsImport.title: Import from Knots
KnotsImport.description: Upload a Knots export file. If the file includes people who are not in this group yet, you can add them here before importing.
KnotsImport.expenseCount: {count, plural, one {# expense} other {# expenses}} found
KnotsImport.missingParticipantsLabel: People to add to this group
KnotsImport.missingParticipantsDescription: Enter an email for each person. New accounts are created automatically and linked to this group. If they already have an account, they are added as members.
KnotsImport.softCreateHint: They can register later with this email to access the group.

errors.invalidFormat: This file is not a valid Knots export.

invalidFileType.title: Invalid file type
invalidFileType.description: Please select a JSON or CSV Knots export file.

noContent.title: No file content
noContent.description: Please select a Knots export file first.

error.title: Import failed
error.description: Failed to import Knots export file.

cancelled.title: Import cancelled
cancelled.description: The import was stopped before it finished.

SplitwiseImport.title: Import from Splitwise
SplitwiseImport.description: Upload a Splitwise CSV export. Match each name from the file to a group member, or add someone by email before importing.
SplitwiseImport.expenseCount: {count, plural, one {# expense} other {# expenses}} found
SplitwiseImport.autoMatchedCount: {count, plural, one {# name matched automatically} other {# names matched automatically}}
SplitwiseImport.participantMappingDescription: Each column in the CSV is a person from Splitwise. Link them to members in this group, or add new members by email.
SplitwiseImport.softCreateHint: They can register later with this email to access the group.

noContent.title: No CSV content
noContent.description: Please select a CSV file first.

incompleteMapping.title: Mapping incomplete
incompleteMapping.description: Choose a member or email for {name}.

cancelled.title: Import cancelled
cancelled.description: The import was stopped before it finished.

ProfileSettings.title: Profile Settings
ProfileSettings.emailDescription: Your email address cannot be changed.
ProfileSettings.usernameDescription: Your username appears in URLs for your profile. It must be unique.
ProfileSettings.preferencesDescription: Customize your timezone, currency, language, and appearance.
ProfileSettings.blockedUsersDescription: Manage users you have blocked. Blocked users cannot add you to groups or send you friend requests.

SignOutAll.dialogDescription: This will end all active sessions, including this one. You will be redirected to the login page.

BlockedUsers.title: Blocked Users
BlockedUsers.description: Block users by selecting a friend or entering their email address.
BlockedUsers.confirmBlockDescription: Blocking {name} will also remove them from your friends list. They won't be notified about the block.

NameForm.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most 100 characters
NameForm.label: Display Name

UsernameForm.label: Username
UsernameForm.description: Used in your profile URL. Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.

PasswordForm.newPasswordSameAsCurrent: New password must be different from current password
PasswordForm.passwordHint: Min 8 characters, max 128. Must include at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one digit.
PasswordForm.errorTooLong: Must be no more than 128 characters
PasswordForm.errorMissingUppercase: Must contain at least one uppercase letter
PasswordForm.errorMissingLowercase: Must contain at least one lowercase letter
PasswordForm.errorMissingDigit: Must contain at least one digit

Friends.title: Friends
Friends.description: Save people you share expenses with so you can add them to groups quickly.
Friends.loadError: Failed to load friends. Please try again later.
Friends.listDescription: Friends can be added to groups by email when you create or edit a group.
Friends.empty: You haven't added any friends yet.
Friends.addDescription: Enter their email address. We'll send them an invitation to connect on Knots. You can optionally set a display name.
Friends.removeFriendDescription: Remove {name} from your friends list? They will not be removed from any groups.
Friends.requestsDescription: People who added you on Knots. Accept to add them to your friends list.
Friends.unblockDialogDescription: You have blocked {email}. To add them as a friend, you need to unblock them first.

Balances.summaryDescription: Net amounts across all groups you share with each friend.

BalanceDetail.title: Balance with {name}
BalanceDetail.emptyDescription: Balances appear when you and {name} are both members of the same group.
BalanceDetail.notConnectedDescription: Accept the connection request to see balances with this friend.

Expenses.title: Expenses with {name}
Expenses.description: All expenses you share with this friend, across groups.
Expenses.listDescription: Expenses you share with this friend, across groups.
Expenses.empty: No expenses with this friend yet.

Members.pickFriend: Choose from your friends or enter an email.
Members.leaveGroupDescription: Are you sure you want to leave this group? Your past expenses will remain in the group history.

MyGroups.title: My Groups
MyGroups.loadError: Failed to load groups. Please try again later.
MyGroups.noGroups: You are not a member of any groups yet.
MyGroups.noGroupsHint: Create a group to start splitting expenses with others.
MyGroups.createGroupDescription: Enter a name for your group. You can invite members after creating it.
MyGroups.leaveGroupConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to leave "{name}"? Your past expenses will remain in the group history.
MyGroups.deleteGroupConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete "{name}" and all its expenses, balances, and history for every member. This cannot be undone.

GroupDangerZone.title: Group management
GroupDangerZone.description: Archive hides this group from your list without deleting data. Delete permanently removes the group for everyone.
GroupDangerZone.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete "{name}" and all its expenses, balances, and history for every member. This cannot be undone.

Notifications.selectParticipant: Notify me about changes by others
Notifications.permissionDenied: Notification permission was denied. Enable it in your browser settings.
Notifications.notSupported: Push notifications are not supported on this device.
Notifications.filterHint: Choose whose changes to follow and which events to receive.
Notifications.selectAtLeastOneFilter: Select at least one member or event.
Notifications.subscribeError: Could not enable notifications. Please try again.

AppError.title: Something went wrong
AppError.description: Local app data was cleared. Your session will also be ended so you can start fresh from the homepage.
